prompt_improvements.improvement: Require the implementor prompt to request concrete staging validation artifacts for App Insights and Log Analytics criteria (KQL query text, query results, and timestamped run identifier).
Require explicit metric-instrument reasoning in the prompt (counter vs gauge vs histogram) and mandate dimension/tag design for per-run vs aggregate analysis before coding.
Require an acceptance-criteria mapping table in the final response linking each criterion to source lines and at least one test or deployment verification step.
